name: Texas Venison Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound venision sirloin, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
3 large jalapeno chile peppers, seeded and chopped
2 cups canned black beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or kettle over moderately high heat.
2. Brown venison and ground beef in batches, transferring each to a bowl when browned; leave liquid in the pot.
3. Cook onions, green pepper, celery, garlic, and chiles in beef juices, stirring until onions are soft.
4. Add masa harina, chili powder, cayenne, cumin, white pepper, and salt; stir constantly for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in tomatoes, beef broth, and meat; bring to a simmer, uncovered, and cook 1 1/2 hours or until meat is tender.
6. Stir in beans and continue to simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
